title: Inweder Gold Candle Holders for Candlesticks - Set of 3 Taper Candle Holders Metal Candlestick Holders for Table Decoration Candle Stick Stands Wedding Party Home Decor Fits 2cm Diameter Candles
features: SHINE BRIGHT: Our candle holder features a high-quality metal coating that keeps it sleek, rustproof, and lustrous for a long time. This candle holder not only has an attractive look, but is also sturdy and durable. Perfect for home decor, it adds a highlight to your table and Mantelpiece

Vintage and Classic: The graceful curved silhouette and brass gold add to the vintage and elegance of our candle stick stands. And the bright finish adds a modern touch, making it suitable for different home styles. The brass gold colour provides a luxurious feel and a romantic atmosphere for your party or candlelit dinner
SUITABLE SIZE: This candle holder set contain 3 different heights candlestick holder (15cm/18.5cm/23.5cm). The base diameter is 6.8cm wide. Candles are not included

Various Applications: Our elegant and sophisticated candle holders are suitable for all occasions. Decorating your mantelpiece, living room, a table for the holidays or for special occasions such as weddings, parties, ceremonies, anniversaries and events, they create a romantic atmosphere and add a touch of class and elegance. This candlestick add a lovely display to any centrepiece or table setting

GREAT FOR GIFTS: Our candle stand set fits 2.2cm diameter taper candles and candlesticks, is the best presnets for the birthday, housewarming, Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Mothers' day and some special days
